H818_acceptance_canary.label: H818 acceptance-canary (Max-orchestrator path)
H818_acceptance_canary.caveat: NOT a demonstrated four-account production batch; orchestrator path existed. Single-subcard canaries. taru = non-promoting presplit canary, EXCLUDED from the production-canary clean-rate denominator.

gaRanA (ga_ran_a~~h0_zz_sch).calls: not_recoverable_exact (run_summary calls=7 conflates durgA+gaRanA+s10 segment; no call_id in run_events -> cannot dedup to real calls)

production_canaries.calls_per_clean_subcard: INCOMPLETE — durgA 1 call/1 clean recoverable exactly; darvI 5 calls/0 clean; gaRanA exact calls not_recoverable; family aggregate NOT published

presplit_canary.taru: 2 calls, 1 clean, NON-PROMOTING presplit stitch canary (5 fragments healed+stitched); reported separately, not in the 3-card clean-rate denominator

economy.cost_per_clean: not_recoverable (run_events has no token field; dashboard cost:null)

H255_no_pwg_workflow.label: H255 no_pwg supplement-chain (Workflow-tool drains)
H255_no_pwg_workflow.schema_caveat: wf_output.no_pwg_*.json files are per-run snapshots; requeues (w1/w1.rq/w1.rq2; w03/w03_rq1; w04/w04_rq1; w05/w05_rq1) re-attempt the SAME keys — do NOT pool naively across a window and its requeue.

audit_clean_recoverable.other_windows: audit reports OVERWRITTEN (single local audit_window.report.json = w05_rq1); per-window audit-clean = not_recoverable from artifacts; RUN_LOG-sourced promoted counts below (cited).

audit_clean_run_log_sourced.no_pwg_w1 (H214): 5 clean / 24 headwords / 58 subcards (store 11,163->11,185, +22 rows); w1 first run infra-crippled (52/58 null)
audit_clean_run_log_sourced.no_pwg_w02 (rerun, 0405UTC): 10/15 clean; audit flagged 3 (2 STRANDED-ANCHOR[{Tn}], 1 circular-gloss); store 11,590->11,605
audit_clean_run_log_sourced.no_pwg_w06 (1913UTC): 29/54 clean; 7 nulls (1 kill-timeout + 6 selfheal-nothing) + 10 content-flagged; store 11,505->11,558
audit_clean_run_log_sourced.no_pwg_w10 (2109UTC): 11/18 clean (9 real + 2 degenerate); H858 grammar-field-stranding on gokzuraka; store 11,579->11,590

H255_no_pwg_workflow.population_audit_clean_rate: per-window 41%-69% (median ~62%); EXCLUDES w1 infra-crippled first run (5/58=9%). Independently corroborated by the H818 acceptance report standing finding: no_pwg audit-clean ~60-65%, explicitly "above the lane's real clean rate", vs the 80% bar.

economy.tokens: not_recoverable per-window (Workflow journal.jsonl transient/gone; RUN_LOG cites isolated totals e.g. w1 ~3.4M, H442 ~1.8M/window)

economy_projected.basis: PER_AGENT_TOKENS=184000, PER_AGENT_USD=0.347 (Sonnet-4.x list rate inherited by parse_workflow_cost.py; comment claims Sonnet-5 shares $3/$15 list), REALISM_FACTOR=1.35

100_headword.note: H911 prose "167.6" is a rounding slip; deterministic value = 124*1.35 = 167.4; 167.4*184000 = 30,801,600 tok; 167.4*0.347 = $58.09. Reproduced offline, no live call.

economy_projected.projected_gate: $58.09 <= $75/100hw -> PASS on the PROJECTED-cost field only (optimistic one-call-per-batch FLOOR x 1.35). This is NOT observed economy.
economy_projected.observed_economy: NOT MEASURABLE from recoverable evidence (tokens not_recoverable both families) -> observed calls/clean and observed $/clean are INCONCLUSIVE, NOT substituted by the projection.
